response.justification: The candidate lacks the required 8 years of C++ experience and 5 years of large-scale infrastructure/cloud compute platform expertise; their work is primarily in TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang with minimal evidence of cloud compute leadership, distributed systems design, or C++-centric architecture.
strengths: Strong full-stack versatility with diverse tech exposure
Proven mentorship and workshop leadership in testing and DevOps
Active open-source contributions and technical communication skills
concerns: Only 1-2 years of C++ experience (NI LabWindows), far below 8-year requirement
No demonstrable experience with cloud compute platforms or distributed systems at scale
Lacks documented leadership in cloud/DevOps engineering teams or architectural ownership
